Fields.Name: Recognition Distance
Fields.Description: Distance to recognize enemy characters: metres

Fields.Name: Recognition Angle: X
Fields.Description: X angle for recognizing enemy characters: The current direction of line of sight is 0 degrees, and the top is +.

Fields.Name: Recognition Angle: Y
Fields.Description: Y angle for recognizing enemy characters: The current direction of line of sight is 0 degrees, and the top is +.

Fields.Name: Territory Distance
Fields.Description: Distance of one's own territory. If the recognized player leaves this distance, it will return to its initial position.

Fields.Name: Threat Rate before Attack
Fields.Description: Probability of threatening before attacking

Fields.Name: Initial Recognition Intimidation
Fields.Description: Whether to always intimidate the player when recognizing the player for the first time

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Distance
Fields.Description: Distance when attacking.

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Spacing
Fields.Description: Play between attacks. Avoid vibration near the distance

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Frequency
Fields.Description: Frequency of attacks

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Action ID
Fields.Description: Type of attack

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Minimum Delay
Fields.Description: Minimum delay time from when it becomes possible to attack until it attacks.

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Maximum Delay
Fields.Description: The longest delay time from when the attack becomes possible until it attacks.

Fields.Name: Attack 1: Cone Angle
Fields.Description: If the angle between the line of sight and the direction vector toward the target is within this angle, the attack is OK.
